requirements: New users must register via referral link, complete email and KYC verification, deposit funds and meet tiered trading volume requirements to unlock the full bonus package. Bonus is distributed as trading vouchers across multiple milestone tasks.
riskNotes: Bonus terms may change without notice. Bonus vouchers cannot be withdrawn directly â€” only profits from trading with them may be eligible. Always check the official promotion page before claiming. Crypto trading involves significant risk of loss.
shortDescription: Bybit offers one of the most competitive crypto welcome bonus packages with up to 30,000 USDT for new users who deposit and trade.
longDescription: Bybit is a major global crypto exchange known for derivatives, spot trading, copy trading and aggressive promotional campaigns. Founded in 2018 and headquartered in Dubai, Bybit serves over 30 million users worldwide with a wide range of trading products including futures, options, and a growing spot market. Their welcome bonus for new users is among the highest in the industry, distributed across tiered tasks that reward registration, first deposit, and trading volume milestones. Bybit holds a Virtual Asset license from Dubai VARA and has expanded significantly into Web3 wallet and DeFi products.
editorNote: Top pick for serious traders. The 30K USDT ceiling is industry-leading but requires meaningful trading volume to unlock all tiers. Copy trading and Web3 wallet integration are genuinely best-in-class. Not for no-KYC users.

sources.notes: Manual verification â€” bonus tiers, expiry window, KYC requirement confirmed

bonusNote: Up to 30,000 USDT across all tasks — typical first-week reward is 200–600 USDT for standard deposits
realisticUserExpectation: Most users earn 200–600 USDT completing deposit + trading tasks; 30,000 USDT max requires very high trading volume over 30 days
bonusConditionSummary: Complete KYC + deposit + trading volume tasks within 30 days

Their welcome bonus structure is accessible from registration without requiring a deposit, making it one of the most entry-friendly bonus programs available. The exchange supports spot and futures trading alongside copy trading and staking products.
editorNote: Best no-KYC choice with zero upfront commitment ï¿½ a rare combination. 1,000 USDT ceiling is modest but the frictionless signup is unmatched. Wide altcoin selection makes it ideal for privacy-focused or emerging-market traders.

Their welcome promotion uses a gamified mystery box mechanic where new users receive randomized rewards based on deposit and trading milestones. OKX holds regulatory licenses in Dubai and the Bahamas, positioning itself as one of the more compliance-focused major exchanges outside the US.
editorNote: One of the most established names here. Mystery box structure adds engagement but real bonus value requires active futures trading. Dual VARA + SCB licences and 50M+ users make this our benchmark for exchange trust.

Their welcome promotion rewards new users with deposit-based bonus tiers and futures trading vouchers.

longDescription: KuCoin is a major global crypto exchange founded in 2017 and often called 'The People's Exchange' for its accessible, low-barrier approach. With over 30 million registered users, KuCoin's optional KYC policy is a significant differentiator in markets where users prefer privacy or face barriers to identity verification. The exchange supports spot, futures, copy trading, staking and a lending marketplace. Their welcome bonus is accessible without identity verification, though higher withdrawal limits and full feature access require KYC completion.
editorNote: 30M+ users with no KYC for basic access ï¿½ a strong combination. The 500 USDT bonus ceiling is low but the platform depth is excellent. A deposit is required to activate the bonus. Good fallback for privacy-focused users.

The exchange offers a comprehensive product range including spot, futures, options, ETFs and DeFi products. Their welcome bonuses target new users through a tiered structure of deposit and trading milestones.
editorNote: Legacy Huobi brand with a smaller footprint post-rebrand. Still reliable for Asian market access and institutional derivatives. 2,000 USDT bonus is fair. Solid backup choice; not our first recommendation for new users.

Their welcome bonus structure is specifically designed to reward active futures trading, with the majority of the bonus ceiling only accessible to users who reach significant trading volume milestones. The no-KYC basic access makes onboarding fast for users in restricted regions.
editorNote: Built for professional derivatives traders. The unusual combination of no-KYC access and an 8,800 USDT ceiling makes it uniquely positioned. Best for experienced traders comfortable with leverage and risk management.

shortDescription: Binance is the world's largest crypto exchange by trading volume, offering a comprehensive ecosystem including spot, futures, P2P and DeFi services.
longDescription: Binance is the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and user count. Founded in 2017 by Changpeng Zhao, it has grown to serve over 185 million registered users across more than 100 countries. Binance offers an expansive product suite including spot trading, futures, options, P2P marketplace, Launchpad, DeFi integrations, NFTs and its own blockchain (BNB Chain). Despite regulatory challenges in multiple jurisdictions including the U.S. and UK, Binance remains the dominant global crypto trading venue by volume.
editorNote: The undisputed volume leader with the deepest liquidity and most comprehensive ecosystem. Regulatory restrictions in the U.S. and UK are a significant limitation for traders in those markets. For everyone else, Binance offers unmatched depth and product range.
bonusNote: Up to 100 USDT welcome reward — reliable, verifiable offer with standard KYC and deposit conditions

bonusTiers.note: Reward paid in Bitcoin to your Coinbase wallet

pros: Most trusted and regulated crypto exchange globally
Publicly listed on NASDAQ (COIN) — transparent financials
Available in US, EU, UK — ideal for regulated-market users
Beginner-friendly interface with strong educational resources
Multiple payment methods including Apple Pay and Google Pay
FDIC-insured USD balances up to $250,000
cons: Fixed $10 bonus only — much lower than competitors
Full KYC mandatory — no anonymous access
Higher trading fees than most competitors (0.5–1.5% flat)
No futures or leverage trading on main platform
Not available in major emerging markets (NG, ID, VN, TR)
requirements: New users must sign up via referral link, complete full KYC verification, and buy or sell $100 or more in any cryptocurrency to receive the $10 BTC reward.
riskNotes: Coinbase is a publicly listed, regulated exchange. Crypto assets are not protected by government deposit insurance. $10 bonus is paid in Bitcoin and subject to official terms.
shortDescription: Coinbase is the most trusted and regulated crypto exchange in the US and EU, publicly listed on NASDAQ. Best for beginners in developed markets seeking a fully licensed, user-friendly platform.
longDescription: Coinbase, founded in 2012, is the largest and most regulated cryptocurrency exchange in the United States, listed on NASDAQ since 2021. It serves over 100 million verified users across the US, UK, EU, Canada and Australia. Coinbase holds licenses from FinCEN, the FCA (UK), MiCA-compliant EU regulators, and multiple US state money transmitter licences. Unlike most competitors, Coinbase undergoes regular public financial audits as a listed company. Its interface is intentionally simplified for first-time buyers, with a separate 'Advanced Trade' view for experienced traders. The welcome bonus is modest at $10 in Bitcoin — this reflects Coinbase's positioning: trust and compliance over promotional offers.
editorNote: Our pick for US and EU users who prioritise regulatory compliance and long-term platform trust over maximum bonus size. The $10 reward is genuinely low compared to Bybit or OKX, but Coinbase's NASDAQ listing, FCA registration and FDIC-insured USD balances make it the obvious choice for users in regulated markets who cannot or will not use offshore exchanges.
bonusNote: $10 BTC upon first qualifying trade — most reliable and straightforward bonus in the industry
geoRestrictions: Available in US, UK, EU, CA, AU. Not available in Nigeria, Indonesia, Vietnam, Philippines, Turkey.
realisticUserExpectation: $10 in BTC is received reliably upon completing first trade; no gimmicks, no volume requirements
bonusConditionSummary: Buy or sell $100+ of crypto; $10 BTC credited automatically
